name: mcp-plugin-template
description: Shared MCP plugin template for Claude Code and Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Starter template for a shared Claude and Codex MCP plugin.
interface.longDescription: A reusable template that keeps Claude and Codex plugin metadata separate while sharing one MCP server implementation under src/.
defaultPrompt: Inspect the MCP server exposed by this plugin.
Explain how to extend this template with a new tool.
Review the shared src implementation for missing pieces.
